data.title: Eminent Gold Corp. completes final payment for Celts Project in Nevada, 560 hectares acquired within Walker Lane Trend.
data.description: Eminent Gold Corp., listed on TSXV as EMNT, OTCQB as EMGDF, and FSE as 7AB, successfully completed the acquisition of the Celts Project located in the highly prospective Walker Lane Trend of southwestern Nevada. The final payment for the purchase, covering a total area of 560 hectares, was made recently.

data.title: CoinW excels at Coinfest Asia 2025 Bali with industry insights, as an event sponsor and speaker. #cryptocurrencyinnovation #CoinW #CoinfestAsia2025 (Character count: 160)
data.description: In Hong Kong on August 25, 2025, CoinW, a prominent cryptocurrency asset trading platform, played a key role as a sponsor and speaker at Coinfest Asia 2025. This event showcased CoinW's dedication to fostering innovation and partnerships within the global cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: Flow Beverage Corp. faces repayment demands and security enforcement notices, CEO departure. Received from NFS Leasing Canada Ltd. and RI Flow LLC on August 22, 2025.
data.description: In Toronto, Flow Beverage Corp. (TSX:FLOW; OTCPK:FLWBF) revealed that it and some subsidiaries were issued repayment demand letters on August 22, 2025, along with notices of intention to enforce a security under section 241 of the Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act (Canada) on the same date by NFS Leasing Canada Ltd. and RI Flow LLC. The Notices were concerning purported defaults under specific secured loans.

data.title: Datavault AI and Burke Products partner to end stolen valor, identity fraud for US military with VerifyU™.
data.description: Datavault AI and Burke Products collaborate to address the issue of stolen valor and identity fraud within the US military using the patented VerifyU Platform. The platform leverages advanced technology to combat these crimes, ensuring the integrity of military identities. This partnership aims to protect the identities of over 1.3 million active-duty service members and numerous veterans in the United States.

data.title: Report on Global Combat Cloud market shows growth opportunities driven by integration of commercial tech to military standards. Multiple cloud service providers and companies identified in ResearchAndMarkets.com's report.
data.description: A report titled "Growth Opportunities in the Global Combat Cloud for Defense Applications Market" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report highlights the increasing trend of militaries adopting cloud computing for hosting digital assets on a secure platform to enhance collaboration between branches and effectively manage security risks. The research service explores current market trends, key cloud service providers, and emerging companies in the industry. This shift towards combat cloud solutions is driven by the need for improved security and cross-functional cooperation.

data.title: Humanoid Global in Vancouver announces CEO transition, with changes in management. (Word count: 12)
data.description: Vancouver, British Columbia – August 25, 2025 – Today, Humanoid Global Holdings Corp. revealed adjustments to its leadership team. The company trades on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the ticker symbol ROBO, the Frankfurt Stock Exchange as 0XM1, and on the OTC Pink Market as RBOHF.

data.title: MannKind is acquiring scPharmaceuticals to drive revenue growth in cardiometabolic and lung diseases.
data.description: MannKind Corporation has announced its acquisition of scPharmaceuticals in a move that aims to boost revenue growth. The acquisition is expected to position MannKind as a leading player in patient-centered care for cardiometabolic and lung diseases. This strategic decision comes as MannKind looks to enhance its market presence and expand its offerings. The acquisition reflects MannKind's commitment to strengthening its portfolio and leveraging opportunities in the healthcare sector. This move is anticipated to drive MannKind's growth trajectory and further solidify its position in the industry.

data.title: Galmed is increasing authorized share capital to 900M from 50M to enhance capital efficiency and drive shareholder value.
data.description: On August 15, 2025, shareholders of the company approved an amendment to its Articles of Association to significantly boost the authorized share capital from 50,000,000 ordinary shares to 900,000,000 ordinary shares. This decision was made during the Company's Special General Meeting. The company's initial plans include...

data.title: Fundstrat Capital files prospectus for 2 new ETFs with SEC aimed at long-term capital growth.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, Fundstrat Capital revealed the submission of a preliminary prospectus to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for the launch of two fresh exchange-traded funds (ETFs). The first ETF, Fundstrat Granny Shots U.S. Small- & Mid-Cap ETF, targets sustainable growth by investing in small and mid-sized American companies. The second ETF, yet to be named, focuses on tech giants and is designed to offer investors exposure to innovative companies in the technology sector. This move signifies Fundstrat Capital's strategic expansion in the investment market, aiming to capitalize on the potential growth of promising sectors.

data.title: Zimmer Biomet to present at Morgan Stanley Healthcare Conference on Sep 8, 2025 at 8:30 am ET.
data.description: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. disclosed that executives from the firm will participate in the Annual Morgan Stanley Healthcare Conference on September 8, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The event provides a platform for company management to engage with stakeholders and investors and is a part of Zimmer Biomet's public relations strategy. Zimmer Biomet is listed on the NYSE and SIX stock exchanges under the ticker symbol ZBH. This conference is significant for the company as it allows them to showcase their latest developments and discuss future plans. The conference will be broadcast live, offering an opportunity for investors and other interested parties to tune in and get insights into Zimmer Biomet's operations and growth trajectory. Such engagements help bolster investor confidence and enhance transparency within the financial markets.

data.title: BitMine (BMNR) holds $8.8 billion in assets, 2nd largest crypto treasury globally, trades $2.8 billion daily.
data.description: BitMine's combined holdings of crypto and cash have surpassed $8.8 billion, with 1.71 million ETH tokens in possession. This marks a significant gain of $2.2 billion from the previous week's reported total of $6.6 billion. BitMine continues to enjoy backing from a select group of institutional investors, highlighted by ARK.

data.title: Eltek gets $2.4M purchase orders from defense client.
data.description: Eltek Ltd., a leading global manufacturer specializing in technologically advanced solutions for printed circuit boards, revealed that it has secured significant orders amounting to $2.4 million from a defense client. The company, situated in Petach Tikva, Israel, shared this update on August 25, 2025.

data.title: DeFi Technologies' Advisory secures second mandate with TenX Protocols, offering digital asset management strategies and trade execution to public digital asset treasury companies.
data.description: DeFi Technologies has introduced a new branch, the DeFi Advisory division, aimed at assisting the increasing number of public digital asset treasury firms. This sector provides services such as digital asset management strategy, trade execution, and corporate advisory all within a single platform. This move comes as a response to the rising interest in DeFi among companies, with DeFi Technologies looking to capitalize on this trend.

data.title: Global Targeted Drug Delivery Market to reach USD 39.6 billion by 2034, growing at 15.5% CAGR from 2025 - 2034. Advancements in nanotechnology and biologics driving market growth. Regulatory incentives and strategic collaborations boosting R&D pipelines.
data.description: The research report by Custom Market Insights highlights the growing Targeted Drug Delivery Market, which was valued at USD 9.8 billion in 2024, expected to reach USD 11.4 billion in 2025, and projected to hit around USD 39.6 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 15.5% from 2025 to 2034. The demand for precise drug delivery systems is being fueled by an increase in chronic diseases like cancer and cardiovascular ailments. Advancements in nanotechnology and lipid nanoparticles have enhanced drug targeting, making treatments more effective with fewer side effects. Technological progressions have facilitated the delivery of biologics and gene therapies, escalating the need for targeted delivery mechanisms. The market is further boosted by partnerships between pharmaceutical companies, biotech firms, and research institutions, along with regulatory incentives. The report covers market size, trends by technology, application, end user, and region, with key segments highlighting factors driving market growth, such as the rise in chronic diseases and advancements in drug delivery systems. Regulatory landscapes and strategic collaborations are emphasized as crucial for market access and growth.

data.title: Orsted stock plunges to all-time low as Trump halts US wind farm project, causing concern for the Danish company.
data.description: Work on the Revolution Wind project off Rhode Island has been halted following an order, causing concerns for the Danish company involved.
